questions.question: Based on the dataset, can you infer anything about the relationship between engine size and fuel efficiency? If so, describe it. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the types of data used in the analysis

questions.question: What information can be inferred from the covariance matrix of the dataset? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the mathematical properties of covariance matrices

questions.question: Can you infer the relative importance of engine size versus fuel efficiency in determining a car model's classification? If so, how? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the concept of Fisher's Linear Discriminant
